diagnosis: NFNet weight-standardization backward tail. Oracle fuses the two sibling channel reductions over [16,3,3,3], all dependent scalar broadcasts, and both returned output tensors (scale vector + full gradient tensor) into one 16-wide Triton kernel. Inductor emits 3+ scheduled kernels because it cannot form a multi-output reduction region whose results feed both a vector and a full-tensor side output in the same kernel. 2.53x real gap (9.5us absolute) is a SCHEDULER_FUSION opportunity.
